name: Synthetic contrasting profile -- frontend/web-development-focused candidate, built for this increment's 'different resume changes the ranking' acceptance test (NEXT-BUILD-SPEC.md Scope-in section 1). Not a real person; used only to prove the semantic-similarity layer is doing real work, not returning a fixed order regardless of input.
raw_text:
JORDAN LEE
Frontend Web Developer Student  |  Aspiring UI/UX Engineer
Calgary, AB  •  jordan.lee.example@example.com
SUMMARY
Computing Science student focused on frontend web development and user-interface design, seeking web developer or UI engineering internships. Strong in JavaScript, React, responsive CSS layout, and accessibility-focused design; has shipped several client-facing web apps for small-business clients.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS
Frameworks & Tools: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Figma, Node.js
Concepts: Responsive Web Design, Accessibility (WCAG), UI/UX Design, REST APIs
EXPERIENCE
Frontend Developer Intern -- Local Web Agency
Built responsive, accessible marketing websites and client dashboards in React and Tailwind CSS for small-business clients; ran manual and automated accessibility audits against WCAG 2.1 AA.
PROJECTS
Portfolio Site Builder -- a drag-and-drop React tool for building personal portfolio websites, with live CSS theming and built-in accessibility checks.
Campus Events UI -- a Next.js/React front end for browsing campus events, focused on mobile-responsive layout and pixel-accurate Figma-to-code implementation.
Component Library -- a small reusable React/Tailwind component library (buttons, forms, modals) published with Storybook documentation and visual regression tests.
experience_level: Undergraduate student, frontend web development focus, seeking web developer / UI engineering internships; some web agency intern experience, no backend/ML background.
